systemLogs.message: Alert triggered: GitHub API has been down for 3 consecutive pings!
Email notification dispatched to subscriber@uptimepro.io: "ALERT: GitHub API is DOWN".
Recovery: GitHub API is UP again. Alerts reset.
Email notification dispatched to subscriber@uptimepro.io: "RECOVERY: GitHub API is UP".
